title: Pan-Seared Pork Dumplings
description: A simple and flavorful dish featuring juicy pork and crispy dumplings.

ingredients.name: Peppery Oil
ingredients.notes: Vegetable oil with a dash of black pepper

instructions: 1. Heat 1 tablespoon of peppery oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the minced garlic and grated ginger, cooking for 1 minute until fragrant.
3. Add the ground pork, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
4. Cook the pork until it is no longer pink, about 5-7 minutes.
5. Add the dumplings to the skillet, cooking for 2-3 minutes on each side until golden brown.
6. Transfer the dumplings to a plate and drizzle with soy sauce.
7. Serve the dumplings hot with a drizzle of sesame oil, if desired.
